findings.title: search_files symlink traversal
findings.notes: search_files follows symlinks outside jupyter_root_dir. Already tracked by draft PR #26. Not re-filed.

surfaces_reviewed: MCP stdio command policy (allowlist + env key denylist)
GitHub skill import (redirect restrictions + tar extraction safety)
File upload (basename + UUID isolation + size limits)
Anchor URI validation (scheme allowlist + control char filtering)
no_new_findings_reason: All major attack surfaces have defense-in-depth mitigations. Authentication enforced on all endpoints. Subprocess calls use shell=False. Path operations use resolve()+relative_to() containment. No template injection surface. YAML uses safe_load only.
